ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date for which the stock data is recorded */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock opened on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached by the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached by the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock closed on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market in which the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the watchlist was created */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, volume spike) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_value" REAL /* Value of the stock when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of financial data provided */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Market coverage of the data provided */,
  " api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data provider's API */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the data is provided */,
  "feed_date" TEXT /* Date when the data feed was received */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data feed file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed (e.g., processed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
